name: marketingskills
description: A comprehensive capability that provides marketing expertise in CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering designed to enhance the performance of Claude Code and AI agents.

inputs.name: campaign_data
inputs.description: Data related to marketing campaigns including metrics and content.

inputs.name: keywords
inputs.description: List of target keywords for SEO optimization.

inputs.name: copy_preferences
inputs.description: Guidelines or preferences for tone and style of copywriting.

inputs.name: performance_metrics
inputs.description: Analytics data used to evaluate and optimize marketing strategies.

outputs.name: optimized_copy
outputs.description: Copywriting outputs optimized for engagement and conversion.

outputs.name: seo_recommendations
outputs.description: Suggestions to improve search engine ranking and visibility.

outputs.name: growth_insights
outputs.description: Insights and strategies for sustainable business growth.

outputs.name: analytics_report
outputs.description: Detailed report summarizing marketing campaign performance.

steps: Collect and input marketing campaign data and performance metrics.
Analyze data for keyword effectiveness and SEO opportunities.
Generate tailored copywriting content aligned with campaign goals and style preferences.
Apply CRO techniques to optimize user engagement and conversion paths.
Produce actionable growth strategies based on analytics insights.
Compile and present comprehensive analytics reports to inform decision-making.
use_cases: Enhancing AI agent-generated marketing content for better SEO and engagement.
Optimizing digital marketing campaigns for improved conversion rates.
Generating targeted copywriting for product launches and promotions.
Analyzing campaign performance to guide growth engineering strategies.
Supporting AI-driven marketing automation with expert marketing tactics.

prompt_templates.name: copywriting_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create an engaging marketing copy focused on {product} targeting {audience}, considering the tone: {tone_preference}.

prompt_templates.name: seo_analysis_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the following keywords {keywords} and provide SEO improvement recommendations.

prompt_templates.name: cro_optimization_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Suggest conversion rate optimization strategies based on these performance metrics: {metrics}.

prompt_templates.name: growth_strategy_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Develop growth engineering tactics to increase user acquisition and retention for {business_model}.

prompt_templates.name: analytics_report_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate an analytics report summarizing campaign performance with insights for improvement.
